author: nflaig
content: I think I permanently damaged dora for this block/attestations view https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/37917#attestations

author: nflaig
content: does a restart maybe fix it?

author: nflaig
content: it happens if I click into the attestations view and then out of it into a different tab, but not exactly sure about the exact trigger that causes this

author: nflaig
content: also it seems like indices are no longer mapped to client labels

author: pk910
content: The underlying issue is that there is a "null" passed as validator names lookup dict..  So there is a JS exception thrown that kills the client side rendering
